notes: List assumes Titan's Grip; Single-Minded Fury runs two Malkorok's Skullcleavers instead. Use at least two yellow gems to keep the meta active, then gem Crit everywhere. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
